description_long: This is a classic steam locomotive with a cylindrical red boiler, black smokestack, and a black cab at the rear. The locomotive features six large spoked wheels on each side, connected by visible rods and axles. The front of the train is equipped with a cowcatcher, a headlamp, and two prominent smokestacks. The cab has a rectangular window on each side, and the body is adorned with pipes and metallic details, including a silver vent on top. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century steam engines, with a robust, industrial appearance. The exterior is primarily metal, with a glossy finish on the red and black painted surfaces.
description: A vintage steam locomotive with a red boiler, black cab, and large spoked wheels, featuring a cowcatcher and dual smokestacks. The design is industrial and detailed, evoking classic 19th-century trains.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, including the red boiler, black cab with a window, and six large spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the cab and the alignment of the wheels, with minimal detail visible on the boiler.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the red boiler, black cab, and wheel arrangement, with pipes and details mirrored.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cowcatcher, headlamp, dual smokestacks, and the rounded front of the boiler.
attribute_window_arrangement: single rectangular window on each side of the cab
